properties.name: MeetingStatus
properties.description: Pipeline-mirror status for a Meeting aggregate (BRQ-008). Drives UI state and gating of downstream actions.

properties.name: MeetingLanguage
properties.description: Supported transcription/protocol language for a Meeting (BRQ-004). Null on the Meeting indicates pending auto-detect.

properties.name: VideoMimeType
properties.description: Allowed container MIME types for uploaded recordings. Sourced from BRQ-002.

properties.name: JobStatus
properties.description: Async job lifecycle status. Shared between TranscriptionJob and ProtocolGenerationJob. Terminal states are immutable (BRQ-009).
